title: Pipe Pump
discoveryHint: Build LV machines to discover this.

sections.text: The Pipe Pump pressurizes fluid pipes. Place its front face against a pipe. Set a target pressure in its GUI. It only draws power while below target, then idles. Higher tiers reach higher pressures for more vertical reach.

Tier	Max Pressure	Power	Vertical Reach
LV	2,000 mBar	8 EU/t	20 blocks
MV	4,000 mBar	32 EU/t	40 blocks
HV	8,000 mBar	128 EU/t	80 blocks
EV	16,000 mBar	512 EU/t	160 blocks
IV	32,000 mBar	2,048 EU/t	320 blocks
